description: Style Note Flaunt your new style with this impeccable teal coloured purse by baggit. Simply grab this trendy purse which goes well with your personality and is a perfect Fit to accentuate your smart phones. The unique design of this bag gives it an edgy look and it has enough space inside to accommodate your items. Product Details Teal purse with one main zippered compartment Fabric manipulation on the front Has one zippered pocket in the front Branding on the back and one zippered pocket Eyelets with lacing on the sides Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 9 cm Width: 16 cm Depth: 1 cm
